title: Trickster Quick Revive Treasure Chest Loot Crate
prompt: Generate exactly one square 2x2 sprite sheet for a top-down survivor game's temporary interactables. Output exactly one image only. Put four separate isolated subjects on a transparent background. If transparency is impossible, use a perfectly flat pure white background with no texture or gradient. Leave generous spacing between all four subjects. No scene, no floor, no text, no UI. Style target: polished Brotato-like 2D readability with thick outlines, simple shading, and clear gameplay silhouettes. Layout: top-left Trickster, a sly announcer mini chad NPC with carnival menace. Top-right Quick Revive machine, a compact arcade-style revive vending machine with strong red emergency accents. Bottom-left Treasure Chest, premium fantasy chest pickup for a mini survivor game. Bottom-right Loot Crate, rugged supply crate reward pickup. Keep all four isolated, centered, and easy to crop into in-game sprites.
